1â†’---
     2â†’name: graphql-skill
     3â†’description: "GraphQL ىٹ¤ي‚¤ë§ˆ ë°ڈ ë¦¬ى،¸ë²„ ى‍‘ى„± ê°€ى‌´ë“œ"
     4â†’---
     5â†’
     6â†’# GraphQL Skill
     7â†’
     8â†’## ى„¤ëھ…
     9â†’
    10â†’GraphQL ىٹ¤ي‚¤ë§ˆ ى •ى‌کë¶€ي„° Controller/Service êµ¬يک„ê¹Œى§€ى‌ک ى›Œيپ¬ي”Œë،œىڑ°ë¥¼ ى•ˆë‚´ي•œë‹¤.
    11â†’
    12â†’## ى‹¤ي–‰ ى ˆى°¨
    13â†’
    14â†’### 1. Schema ى •ى‌ک
    15â†’
    16â†’ىœ„ى¹ک: `graphql/src/main/resources/graphql/schema.graphqls` ëکگëٹ” ë³„ëڈ„ `.graphqls` يŒŒى‌¼
    17â†’
    18â†’```graphql
    19â†’type Feature {
    20â†’    id: ID!
    21â†’    name: String!
    22â†’    user: SimpleUser
    23â†’    createdAt: String!
    24â†’}
    25â†’
    26â†’input CreateFeatureInput {
    27â†’    name: String!
    28â†’}
    29â†’
    30â†’extend type Query {
    31â†’    feature(featureId: ID!): Feature
    32â†’    features(limit: Int, offset: Int): [Feature!]!
    33â†’}
    34â†’
    35â†’extend type Mutation {
    36â†’    createFeature(input: CreateFeatureInput!): Feature!
    37â†’    deleteFeature(featureId: ID!): Boolean!
    38â†’}
    39â†’```
    40â†’
    41â†’### 2. GraphQL Controller
    42â†’
    43â†’ىœ„ى¹ک: `graphql/src/main/kotlin/com/maum/backend/controller/{ëڈ„ë©”ى‌¸}/`
    44â†’
    45â†’```kotlin
    46â†’@Controller
    47â†’class FeatureController(
    48â†’    private val featureService: FeatureService,
    49â†’    private val userService: UserService,
    50â†’) {
    51â†’    @QueryMapping
    52â†’    @PreAuthorize("hasAuthority('User')")
    53â†’    fun features(
    54â†’        @UserId userId: String,
    55â†’        @Argument limit: Int?,
    56â†’        @Argument offset: Int?,
    57â†’    ): List<FeatureResponse> {
    58â†’        val response = featureService.getFeatures(userId, limit ?: 20, offset ?: 0)
    59â†’        return response.featuresList.map { it.toResponse() }
    60â†’    }
    61â†’
    62â†’    @MutationMapping
    63â†’    @PreAuthorize("hasAuthority('User')")
    64â†’    fun createFeature(
    65â†’        @UserId userId: String,
    66â†’        @Argument input: CreateFeatureInput,
    67â†’    ): FeatureResponse {
    68â†’        val response = featureService.createFeature(userId, input.name)
    69â†’        return response.feature.toResponse()
    70â†’    }
    71â†’}
    72â†’```
    73â†’
    74â†’### 3. GraphQL Service (gRPC Client)
    75â†’
    76â†’ىœ„ى¹ک: `graphql/src/main/kotlin/com/maum/backend/service/{ëڈ„ë©”ى‌¸}/`
    77â†’
    78â†’```kotlin
    79â†’@Service
    80â†’class FeatureService {
    81â†’    @GrpcClient("feature-grpc")
    82â†’    private lateinit var stub: FeatureServiceGrpc.FeatureServiceBlockingStub
    83â†’
    84â†’    fun getFeatures(userId: String, limit: Int, offset: Int): ListFeaturesResponse {
    85â†’        val request = ListFeaturesRequest.newBuilder()
    86â†’            .setUserId(userId)
    87â†’            .setLimit(limit)
    88â†’            .setOffset(offset)
    89â†’            .build()
    90â†’        return try {
    91â†’            stub.listFeatures(request)
    92â†’        } catch (e: StatusRuntimeException) {
    93â†’            throw CustomGraphQLException(e.trailers!!, e.status.description)
    94â†’        }
    95â†’    }
    96â†’}
    97â†’```
    98â†’
    99â†’### 4. ë‹¤ى¤‘ ى„œë¹„ىٹ¤ ى–´ê·¸ë¦¬ê²Œى‌´ى…ک
   100â†’
   101â†’```kotlin
   102â†’@QueryMapping
   103â†’fun featureWithUser(
   104â†’    @UserId userId: String,
   105â†’    @Argument featureId: String,
   106â†’): FeatureDetailResponse {
   107â†’    // ى—¬ëں¬ gRPC ى„œë¹„ىٹ¤ يک¸ى¶œ ي›„ ى،°ي•©
   108â†’    val feature = featureService.getFeature(featureId)
   109â†’    val user = userService.getUserInfo(feature.userId)
   110â†’    val score = callService.getMannerScore(feature.userId)
   111â†’
   112â†’    return FeatureDetailResponse(
   113â†’        feature = feature.toResponse(),
   114â†’        user = user.toSimpleUser(),
   115â†’        mannerScore = score,
   116â†’    )
   117â†’}
   118â†’```
   119â†’
   120â†’## GraphQL ى»¨ë²¤ى…ک
   121â†’
   122â†’| ي•­ëھ© | ê·œى¹™ |
   123â†’|------|------|
   124â†’| Query | ى،°يڑŒ (get, list, search) |
   125â†’| Mutation | ىƒ‌ى„±/ىˆکى •/ى‚­ى œ |
   126â†’| Type ëھ… | PascalCase |
   127â†’| Input ëھ… | `{Action}{Domain}Input` |
   128â†’| ى‌¸ى¦‌ | `@PreAuthorize("hasAuthority('User')")` |
   129â†’| ى‚¬ىڑ©ى‍گ ID | `@UserId userId: String` |
   130â†’
   131â†’## ى£¼ى‌کى‚¬ي•­
   132â†’
   133â†’- Controllerى—گى„œ ى§پى ‘ Repository ى ‘ê·¼ ê¸ˆى§€ (ë°کë“œى‹œ gRPC Service ê²½ىœ )
   134â†’- ى—گëں¬ ى²کë¦¬: `CustomGraphQLException` ى‚¬ىڑ©

   136â†’

     2â†’name: grpc-skill

     4â†’---
     5â†’
     6â†’# gRPC Skill
     7â†’
     8â†’## ى„¤ëھ…
     9â†’
    10â†’Protocol Buffers ى •ى‌کë¶€ي„° gRPC ى„œë¹„ىٹ¤ êµ¬يک„ê¹Œى§€ى‌ک ى›Œيپ¬ي”Œë،œىڑ°ë¥¼ ى•ˆë‚´ي•œë‹¤.
    11â†’
    12â†’## ى‹¤ي–‰ ى ˆى°¨
    13â†’
    14â†’### 1. Proto ى •ى‌ک
    15â†’
    16â†’ىœ„ى¹ک: `protobuf/src/main/proto/{ëڈ„ë©”ى‌¸}/{service}.proto`
    17â†’
    18â†’```protobuf
    19â†’syntax = "proto3";
    20â†’package feature;
    21â†’
    22â†’option java_multiple_files = true;
    23â†’option java_package = "com.maum.backend.protobuf.feature";
    24â†’
    25â†’service FeatureService {
    26â†’  rpc GetFeature(GetFeatureRequest) returns (GetFeatureResponse);
    27â†’  rpc CreateFeature(CreateFeatureRequest) returns (CreateFeatureResponse);
    28â†’  rpc ListFeatures(ListFeaturesRequest) returns (ListFeaturesResponse);
    29â†’}
    30â†’
    31â†’message GetFeatureRequest {
    32â†’  string user_id = 1;
    33â†’  string feature_id = 2;
    34â†’}
    35â†’
    36â†’message GetFeatureResponse {
    37â†’  Feature feature = 1;
    38â†’}
    39â†’
    40â†’message Feature {
    41â†’  string id = 1;
    42â†’  string name = 2;
    43â†’  string user_id = 3;
    44â†’  string created_at = 4;
    45â†’}
    46â†’```
    47â†’
    48â†’### 2. Proto ë¹Œë“œ
    49â†’
    50â†’```bash
    51â†’./gradlew :protobuf:clean :protobuf:build
    52â†’```
    53â†’
    54â†’### 3. gRPC Service êµ¬يک„ (ى„œë²„)
    55â†’
    56â†’ىœ„ى¹ک: `{module}/src/main/kotlin/com/maum/backend/controller/`
    57â†’
    58â†’```kotlin
    59â†’@GrpcService
    60â†’class FeatureGrpcService(
    61â†’    private val featureService: FeatureService,
    62â†’) : FeatureServiceGrpc.FeatureServiceImplBase() {
    63â†’
    64â†’    override fun getFeature(
    65â†’        request: GetFeatureRequest,
    66â†’        responseObserver: StreamObserver<GetFeatureResponse>,
    67â†’    ) {
    68â†’        val feature = featureService.getFeature(request.userId, request.featureId)
    69â†’        val response = GetFeatureResponse.newBuilder()
    70â†’            .setFeature(feature.toProto())
    71â†’            .build()
    72â†’        responseObserver.onNext(response)
    73â†’        responseObserver.onCompleted()
    74â†’    }
    75â†’}
    76â†’```
    77â†’
    78â†’### 4. gRPC Client êµ¬يک„ (GraphQL ëھ¨ë“ˆ)
    79â†’
    80â†’ىœ„ى¹ک: `graphql/src/main/kotlin/com/maum/backend/service/{ëڈ„ë©”ى‌¸}/`
    81â†’
    82â†’```kotlin
    83â†’@Service
    84â†’class FeatureService {
    85â†’    @GrpcClient("feature-grpc")
    86â†’    private lateinit var featureStub: FeatureServiceGrpc.FeatureServiceBlockingStub
    87â†’
    88â†’    fun getFeature(userId: String, featureId: String): GetFeatureResponse {
    89â†’        val request = GetFeatureRequest.newBuilder()
    90â†’            .setUserId(userId)
    91â†’            .setFeatureId(featureId)
    92â†’            .build()
    93â†’        return try {
    94â†’            featureStub.getFeature(request)
    95â†’        } catch (e: StatusRuntimeException) {
    96â†’            throw CustomGraphQLException(e.trailers!!, e.status.description)
    97â†’        }
    98â†’    }
    99â†’}
   100â†’```
   101â†’
   102â†’### 5. gRPC ى±„ë„گ ى„¤ى •
   103â†’
   104â†’`application.yml`:
   105â†’```yaml
   106â†’grpc:
   107â†’  client:
   108â†’    feature-grpc:
   109â†’      address: 'dns:///feature-service:9090'
   110â†’      negotiationType: plaintext
   111â†’```
   112â†’
   113â†’## Proto ى»¨ë²¤ى…ک
   114â†’
   115â†’| ي•­ëھ© | ê·œى¹™ |
   116â†’|------|------|
   117â†’| يŒ¨ي‚¤ى§€ | ëڈ„ë©”ى‌¸ëھ… (ى†Œë¬¸ى‍گ) |
   118â†’| ى„œë¹„ىٹ¤ëھ… | `{Domain}Service` |
   119â†’| ë©”ى„œë“œëھ… | `Get`, `Create`, `Update`, `Delete`, `List` |
   120â†’| ي•„ë“œëھ… | `snake_case` |
   121â†’| Request/Response | `{Method}Request`, `{Method}Response` |
   122â†’
   123â†’## ى£¼ى‌کى‚¬ي•­
   124â†’
   125â†’- Proto ë³€ê²½ ى‹œ ي•کىœ„ يک¸ي™کى„± ىœ ى§€ (ي•„ë“œ ë²ˆيک¸ ى‍¬ى‚¬ىڑ© ê¸ˆى§€)
   126â†’- `optional` ي‚¤ى›Œë“œë،œ ى„ يƒ‌ ي•„ë“œ ëھ…ى‹œ
   127â†’- ى—گëں¬ ى²کë¦¬: `responseObserver.onError(Status.NOT_FOUND.asException())`
   128â†’

    10â†’ىƒˆë،œىڑ´ JPA Entityى™€ Repositoryë¥¼ ي”„ë،œى ‌يٹ¸ ى»¨ë²¤ى…کى—گ ë§‍ê²Œ ى‍‘ى„±ي•œë‹¤.

    12â†’## ى‹¤ي–‰ ى ˆى°¨
    13â†’
    14â†’### 1. Entity ى‍‘ى„±
    15â†’
    16â†’ىœ„ى¹ک: `domain/src/main/kotlin/com/maum/backend/entity/{ëڈ„ë©”ى‌¸}/`
    17â†’
    18â†’```kotlin
    19â†’@Entity
    20â†’@Table(catalog = "{catalog}", name = "{table_name}")
    21â†’class EntityName(
    22â†’    @Id

    30â†’
    31â†’    // ê´€ê³„ ë§¤ي•‘ (ي•„ىڑ”ى‹œ)
    32â†’    @ManyToOne(fetch = FetchType.LAZY)
    33â†’    @JoinColumn(name = "category_id", referencedColumnName = "code")

    35â†’
    36â†’    // ê°گى‚¬ ي•„ë“œ
    37â†’    @CreatedDate

    40â†’

    45â†’
    46â†’### 2. Repository ى‍‘ى„±

    48â†’ىœ„ى¹ک: `domain/src/main/kotlin/com/maum/backend/repository/{ëڈ„ë©”ى‌¸}/`
    49â†’
    50â†’```kotlin

    52â†’    fun findByUserId(userId: String): List<EntityName>

    56â†’
    57â†’### 3. Catalog ى„ يƒ‌
    58â†’
    59â†’| Catalog | ëڈ„ë©”ى‌¸ |
    60â†’|---------|--------|
    61â†’| `maum` | user, profile, call, product, follow |
    62â†’| `moment` | post, moment, comment, like |
    63â†’| `chat` | chat_room |

    65â†’
    66â†’### 4. ى»´يŒŒى‌¼ ي™•ى‌¸

    72â†’## ى£¼ى‌کى‚¬ي•­
    73â†’
    74â†’- Entityëٹ” `var` ىµœى†Œي™”, ë³€ê²½ ي•„ىڑ”ي•œ ي•„ë“œë§Œ `var`
